title: SubjectContext
description: The access-control context for the subject (requester) side of a PolicyDecision request. Carries the subject's type, roles, and arbitrary attributes.

subjectId.description: URN of the requesting subject (user, service, app, or workload).

kind.description: The subject type: user, service, app, or workload.

roles.description: Roles assigned to this subject in the current context.

attributes.description: Arbitrary additional attributes for use in policy condition expressions.
